title: Bellaria

description.text: Sometimes even the tiniest of spaces need to be adorned with beauty…like a jewelry box or treasure chest! That was the plan for this Guest WC in a gorgeous apartment overlooking the city.

Lots of detail - an abundance of different leaves, flowers, fruits, birds, butterflies and even 2 little monkeys. Lots of wonderful vibrant colours popping out from this beautiful sumptuous dark blue background, including metallic gold paint that shimmers in the right light.

location: Guest WC. Private Home. Vienna, Austria
